HeroSection.subtitle: Accounting, invoicing, payroll and connectivity. 100% adapted to Venezuelan regulations.

FeaturesSection.subtitle: Nine integrated modules within a single digital ecosystem built for the Venezuelan market.

features.title: Accounting Advisory
features.description: VEN-NIF accounting, LOTTT payroll, HR, engineering, and marketing — all unified in a single module.

features.title: Telecom 5G / eSIM
features.description: Physical and eSIM line provisioning, corporate fleet management, usage monitoring, and real-time network telemetry.

features.title: Artificial Intelligence
features.description: Gemini 2.0 Flash built in. Contract drafting, tax analysis, AI-powered pitches, waste classification, and more.

features.title: Legal AI & Permits
features.description: Automated contract generation, notarial powers, CONATEL and SENIAT permits, and Official Gazette tracking.

features.title: Ameru — Eco-Credits
features.description: AI-driven waste classification, certified eco-credit issuance, and a sustainability marketplace.

features.title: Dashboard & Analytics
features.description: Live KPIs, cash-flow analysis, financial projections, and exportable PDF and PowerPoint reports.

features.title: Tax Management
features.description: IVA, ISLR, IGTF, parafiscal contributions, municipal taxes, withholdings, and an automated tax calendar.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: Cryptographic sealing, an immutable audit trail, and AES-256 encryption across the entire platform.

AboutUsSection.subtitle: We build software engineering solutions designed for operational excellence.
AboutUsSection.mission_text: To ensure reliable business management through secure, transparent, and immutable records.
AboutUsSection.vision_text: To become the global benchmark for efficiency in forward-thinking companies and institutions.

testimonials.text: This platform eliminated the risk of document loss. Secure record-keeping is exactly the guarantee the private sector needed.
Process automation lets us run large-scale projects with a level of efficiency we had never seen in the region.

FaqSection.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about the platform, so you can decide with confidence.

items.question: How do you guarantee Venezuelan tax compliance?
items.answer: System Kyron monitors the Official Gazette daily with AI. All IVA (16 %), IGTF (3 %), and ISLR (34 %) filings are calculated automatically under current VEN-NIF rules. Regulatory updates deploy without any action on your part.

items.question: Can I manage multiple companies or a holding?
items.answer: Absolutely. The Partners & Directors portal consolidates the accounting of several entities into a single Command Center. Each company keeps its own data while group-level reports are available in real time.

items.question: How does the BCV exchange rate work in invoices and payments?
items.answer: The Central Bank of Venezuela (BCV) rate is updated automatically on the platform. Every invoice and bolivar transaction generates its USD equivalent at the current BCV rate, simplifying IGTF (3 %) compliance.

items.question: Is migrating my data from another system difficult?
items.answer: Not at all. Our team guides a bulk import of your historical data. For most standard tools (Excel, Profit, Mónica), migration is completed in under 48 hours at no extra cost.

items.question: Does the Telecom module work with Venezuelan carriers?
items.answer: Yes. The Telecom portal supports Movilnet, Digitel, and Movistar lines — including eSIM activation, 5G provisioning, and corporate fleet management by department with configurable usage caps.

items.question: What are Ameru AI Eco-Credits?
items.answer: Ameru is our sustainability module. It classifies waste using AI, issues certified eco-credits for every kilogram recycled, and connects you to the Kyron eco-credit marketplace to monetize your environmental impact.

items.question: How secure is the platform?
items.answer: All data is encrypted with AES-256. Authentication uses JWT with HTTP-only cookies and 7-day sessions. The audit log is immutable — every action is recorded with a timestamp, IP address, and the responsible user.

items.question: How does registration differ for individuals vs. companies?
items.answer: Individuals register with their national ID and personal information, unlocking civil-document modules. Companies register with their RIF and legal-representative details, unlocking accounting, payroll, and enterprise modules.
